description.ko: 견고한 단일 구조체가 기하학적 파편과 글리치 아티팩트의 혼돈스러운 폭풍으로 분해되는 디지털 붕괴의 미학을 연구합니다.
description.en: A study of digital decay where a solid monolith fragments into a chaotic storm of geometric shards and glitch artifacts.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Entropy Matrix.' A monolithic #1A1A1A obsidian cuboid suspended in a clinical #FFFFFF void, undergoing a violent yet controlled geometric dissolution. The structure shatters into thousands of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards that transition into pixel-sorted digital dust. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes are intersected by heavy digital glitch artifacts and sharp RGB chromatic aberration. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the mathematical elegance of systematic data corruption and architectural collapse.
